channel.title: Libreoffice on pedro andrade
channel.description: Recent content in Libreoffice on pedro andrade

item.title: LibreOffice: Spell checking, dictionary, localization et all
item.description: So in order to install further features to your LibreOffice installation, like spell checking, dictionary, localization and some other features, in a a very easy way, just copy these simple commands. Mind you that the tag after the package name, refers to my personal taste/installation, i.e.: libreoffice-l10n-pt where pt is my country localization files. in myspell-pt-pt pt-pt is specific to European Portuguese. To get a full list of options and choose your own check the Debian Package page.
